title: justicia angustiflora
intro: Justicia angustiflora, also known as the Narrow-Flowered Justicia, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids in its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Justicia angustiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat a range of health conditions.
